「 As the youngest of the Vilegore children - and thus the least important - Deiliel has spent most of his life being ignored by his parents and elder siblings. Spoiled, bratty and easily bored, he goes through so many companions and playthings that the court is beginning to run out of new 'friends' for the princeling to play with.

Which is why you've been "employed" as Prince Deiliel's newest playmate. Your duties are to entertain him and keep him out of the way of the rest of his family. Best of luck! 」
